meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Use SaaS Starter Kits to Bypass No-Code Limits
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no-code limitations. Use this expert SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional apps faster.
content.answer_block: Overcome no-code limitations by adopting a professional SaaS starter kit. By leveraging Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you transform from a non-coder into a high-velocity product engineer capable of shipping production-grade SaaS applications for clients in days rather than months.
content.intro:
The ceiling of no-code platforms is a silent killer for your freelance business. You start with high-velocity prototypes, only to hit a wall of proprietary limitations, hidden costs, and impossible scaling requirements the moment a client asks for a custom feature. You are trapped in a sandbox, unable to deliver true ownership or performance.

But the era of 'code-only' gatekeeping is dead. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you reclaim control. This isn't about learning syntax; it's about mastering the workflow of an architect. We are stripping away the complexity, using AI-driven orchestration to build scalable, professional-grade software that keeps your clients happy and your delivery speed unmatched.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project with a production-ready starter kit. This provides a secure authentication layer, database schema, and UI foundation, preventing 'blank canvas' paralysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Next.js 14 SaaS starter kit scaffolding with Supabase integration, Stripe subscription handling, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Define the Database Schema
steps.description: Translate client requirements into a relational data model. This creates the backbone of your application, ensuring data integrity and fast queries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase SQL migration for a SaaS user profile, subscription status, and a 'projects' table linked by user_id.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply migration to supabase schema'

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Secure your app by defining user roles. This is a non-negotiable requirement for professional SaaS and protects your clients' data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write RLS policies for Supabase that restrict access so users can only read and update their own project data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement row-level security for project table'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Billing Logic
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe to handle payments automatically. This turns your code into a revenue-generating asset.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler in Next.js API routes that syncs user subscription status with the Supabase profiles table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate stripe webhook listener and sync logic'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your application to a global CDN. This ensures your client's product is live, fast, and scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a Vercel deployment configuration file that optimizes image assets and enables edge caching for the dashboard routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure production build and deploy to vercel'

pro_tips: Always keep your business logic in server-side API routes to prevent client-side data exposure.
Use 'Environment Variable' mapping as your first step to avoid hardcoding secrets during development.
When Claude Code gets stuck, ask it to 'explain the current dependency tree' to identify library conflicts.
Prioritize 'Feature Flags' early so you can deploy incomplete features without breaking the live production environment.
Automate your database backups immediately upon deployment to build trust with high-value clients.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, focus on setting up an automated feedback loop with your client using a tool like Linear or Trello to track feature requests generated by the AI.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in sandboxes and start shipping real, high-value assets that scale with your clients' ambitions. The tools are ready, the framework is set, and the market is waiting for developers who can bridge the gap between concept and code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
